teacherOnboardingTitles: What Type of Teacher Are You?
teacherOnboardingDescriptions: Let's set up your profile. This takes just a minute.
Choose how you'll be assigned to classes and subjects.
Which classes will you be teaching?
Tell us which subjects you teach in each class. Skip if you teach all subjects in all classes.
Your profile is configured. You can always change these later.

education.title: Staff & Teacher Sign-Up
education.subtitle: School accounts are created by your administrator. Staff and teachers are invited via email.
education.heading: Join Your School
education.invitationDesc: If your school administrator sent you an invitation email, click here to accept it and create your account.
education.signInDesc: Sign in to access your school dashboard, manage students, and more.
education.adminDesc: If you are a school owner or administrator, you can register your school directly.
